name: ht_verify(M, SIG_HT, PK.seed, idx_tree, idx_leaf, PK.root)
label: Algorithm 13

inputs.name: PK.seed
inputs.description: n-byte public seed from SLH-DSA public key

inputs.name: idx_tree
inputs.description: Index of the XMSS tree at layer 0 that was used for signing

inputs.name: idx_leaf
inputs.description: Index of the WOTS+ key within the layer 0 XMSS tree that was used for signing

inputs.name: PK.root
inputs.description: n-byte root of the top layer XMSS tree, from SLH-DSA public key

outputs.description: true if the signature is valid, false otherwise

body_raw: node ← xmss_pkFromSig(idx_leaf, SIG_tmp, M, PK.seed, ADRS)
for j from 1 to d - 1 do
node ← xmss_pkFromSig(idx_leaf, SIG_tmp, node, PK.seed, ADRS)
